1вҶ’# Server-spezifische Test-Patterns
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Detail-Referenz вҖ” geladen aus `TESTING.md` Index.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Environment-Variable-Snapshot
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’Tests die `process.env` manipulieren, mГјssen den Originalzustand wiederherstellen:
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’```typescript
    10вҶ’test("uses custom API key from env", async () => {
    11вҶ’  const originalEnv = { ...process.env }
    12вҶ’  try {
    13вҶ’    process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY = "test-key-123"
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’    const result = await createClient()
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’    expect(result.apiKey).toBe("test-key-123")
    18вҶ’  } finally {
    19вҶ’    process.env = originalEnv
    20вҶ’  }
    21вҶ’}
    22вҶ’```
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’### Alternativ mit `beforeEach`/`afterEach`
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’```typescript
    27вҶ’describe("API Client", () => {
    28вҶ’  const originalEnv = { ...process.env }
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’  afterEach(() => {
    31вҶ’    process.env = { ...originalEnv }
    32вҶ’  })
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’  test("falls back to default when key missing", async () => {
    35вҶ’    delete process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY
    36вҶ’    await expect(createClient()).rejects.toThrow(/API key/i)
    37вҶ’  })
    38вҶ’})
    39вҶ’```
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’## Fetch-Mock mit Cleanup
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’```typescript
    44вҶ’describe("AdjustmentAssistant", () => {
    45вҶ’  const originalFetch = globalThis.fetch
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’  afterEach(() => {
    48вҶ’    globalThis.fetch = originalFetch
    49вҶ’  })
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’  test("sends structured request to provider", async () => {
    52вҶ’    globalThis.fetch = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
    53вҶ’      new Response(JSON.stringify({ choices: [{ message: { content: "result" } }] })),
    54вҶ’    )
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’    const result = await assistant.process("input")
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’    expect(result).toBe("result")
    59вҶ’  })
    60вҶ’})
    61вҶ’```
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’## Async-Testing
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’Vitest unterstГјtzt async Tests nativ вҖ” kein spezielles Plugin nГ¶tig:
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’```typescript
    68вҶ’// Async-Ergebnis prГјfen
    69вҶ’test("compiles rules asynchronously", async () => {
    70вҶ’  const rules = await compileRules(draftRules)
    71вҶ’  expect(rules).toHaveLength(3)
    72вҶ’})
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’// Async-Fehler prГјfen
    75вҶ’test("rejects invalid rule format", async () => {
    76вҶ’  await expect(compileRules(invalidInput)).rejects.toThrow(/invalid selector/i)
    77вҶ’})
    78вҶ’```
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’## Zod-Schema-Validierung testen
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’Teste Validierung mit echten Zod-Schemas, nicht Mocks:
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’```typescript
    85вҶ’import { DraftRuleSchema } from "@chat-exporter/shared"
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’test("rejects rule without selector", () => {
    88вҶ’  const result = DraftRuleSchema.safeParse({ effect: { type: "replace", value: "x" } })
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’  expect(result.success).toBe(false)
    91вҶ’  expect(result.error?.issues[0].path).toContain("selector")
    92вҶ’})
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’test.each(["heading", "paragraph", "code-block"])("accepts valid selector type: %s", (type) => {
    95вҶ’  const result = DraftRuleSchema.safeParse({
    96вҶ’    selector: { type, value: "test" },
    97вҶ’    effect: { type: "replace", value: "changed" },
    98вҶ’  })
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’  expect(result.success).toBe(true)
   101вҶ’})
   102вҶ’```
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’## Test-Imports
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’Server-Tests importieren Vitest-Globals explizit:
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’```typescript
   109вҶ’import { describe, expect, test } from "vitest"
   110вҶ’import type { AdjustmentSelection } from "@chat-exporter/shared"
   111вҶ’```
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’## Testdatei-Platzierung
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’Tests liegen **neben dem Quellcode** (co-located):
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’```
   118вҶ’apps/server/src/lib/
   119вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ adjustment-preview.ts
   120вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ adjustment-preview.test.ts
   121вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ adjustment-assistant.ts
   122вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ adjustment-assistant.test.ts
   123вҶ’```
   124вҶ’

1вҶ’# Fixture-Katalog & Factory-Patterns
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Detail-Referenz вҖ” geladen aus `TESTING.md` Index.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Factory-Pattern
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’FГјr Testdaten **Factories mit Defaults + Overrides** verwenden вҖ” resilient gegen Schema-Г„nderungen:
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’```typescript
    10вҶ’import type { AdjustmentSelection } from "@chat-exporter/shared"
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’function createSelection(overrides: Partial<AdjustmentSelection> = {}): AdjustmentSelection {
    13вҶ’  return {
    14вҶ’    blockIndex: 0,
    15вҶ’    blockType: "paragraph",
    16вҶ’    messageId: "message-1",
    17вҶ’    messageIndex: 0,
    18вҶ’    messageRole: "assistant",
    19вҶ’    selectedText: "Example content",
    20вҶ’    textQuote: "Example content",
    21вҶ’    ...overrides,
    22вҶ’  }
    23вҶ’}
    24вҶ’```
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’### Regeln fГјr Factories
    27вҶ’
    28вҶ’- **Spread-Overrides** statt optionale Parameter вҖ” flexibler bei Schema-Erweiterungen
    29вҶ’- **Minimale Defaults** вҖ” nur Pflichtfelder, optionale Felder weglassen
    30вҶ’- **Typisiert** вҖ” `Partial<T>` fГјr Overrides, RГјckgabetyp explizit
    31вҶ’
    32вҶ’## Bestehende Factories (Server)
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’| Factory | Datei | Beschreibung |
    35вҶ’|---------|-------|-------------|
    36вҶ’| `createSelection(overrides?)` | `adjustment-preview.test.ts` | `AdjustmentSelection` mit Defaults |
    37вҶ’| `createSession(overrides?)` | `adjustment-preview.test.ts` | `AdjustmentSessionDetail` mit Messages |
    38вҶ’| `createImportJob(overrides?)` | `adjustment-preview.test.ts` | `ImportJob` mit Defaults |
    39вҶ’
    40вҶ’## E2E-Fixtures (Playwright)
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’E2E-Tests nutzen Playwrights Fixture-System fГјr Page Objects:
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’```typescript
    45вҶ’// e2e/fixtures/test-fixtures.ts
    46вҶ’import { test as base, expect } from "@playwright/test"
    47вҶ’import { HomePage } from "../pages/home.page"
    48вҶ’import { FormatWorkspacePage } from "../pages/format-workspace.page"
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’interface TestFixtures {
    51вҶ’  homePage: HomePage
    52вҶ’  workspace: FormatWorkspacePage
    53вҶ’}
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’export const test = base.extend<TestFixtures>({
    56вҶ’  homePage: async ({ page }, use) => {
    57вҶ’    await use(new HomePage(page))
    58вҶ’  },
    59вҶ’  workspace: async ({ page }, use) => {
    60вҶ’    await use(new FormatWorkspacePage(page))
    61вҶ’  },
    62вҶ’})
    63вҶ’
    64вҶ’export { expect } from "@playwright/test"
    65вҶ’```
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’### Bestehende E2E-Fixtures
    68вҶ’
    69вҶ’| Fixture | Typ | Beschreibung |
    70вҶ’|---------|-----|-------------|
    71вҶ’| `homePage` | `HomePage` | Navigation, URL-Import |
    72вҶ’| `workspace` | `FormatWorkspacePage` | Format-Workspace-Interaktionen |
    73вҶ’| `FIXTURE_IMPORT_ID` | `string` | Seeder-Import-ID fГјr Tests (`"smoke-format-adjustments-v1"`) |
    74вҶ’
    75вҶ’## Neue Factory erstellen вҖ” Checkliste
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’1. Shared-Type aus `@chat-exporter/shared` importieren
    78вҶ’2. Factory neben den Tests definieren (oder in geteilte Datei wenn >2 Tests sie nutzen)
    79вҶ’3. `Partial<T>` fГјr Overrides
    80вҶ’4. Nur Pflichtfelder als Defaults
    81вҶ’5. Spread-Merge: `{ ...defaults, ...overrides }`
    82вҶ’

1вҶ’# Testing Best Practices вҖ” Chat Exporter
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Verbindliche Referenz fГјr alle Tests in diesem Projekt.
     4вҶ’> Dieses Dokument ist ein **Smart Index** вҖ” es enthГӨlt die Kern-Prinzipien inline und verweist auf Detail-Module in `docs/testing/`.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’## Tech-Stack
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’| Bereich | Tool | Version |
     9вҶ’|---------|------|---------|
    10вҶ’| Unit/Integration | **Vitest** | ^4.0 |
    11вҶ’| E2E | **Playwright** | ^1.58 |
    12вҶ’| Coverage | **@vitest/coverage-v8** | ^4.0 |
    13вҶ’| Monorepo | **Turborepo + pnpm** | вҖ” |
    14вҶ’| Linting | **Biome** | ^2.4 |
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’## Aufgabenbasiertes Routing
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’**Lies nur die Module, die fГјr deine aktuelle Aufgabe relevant sind:**
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’| Aufgabe | Lade diese Module |
    21вҶ’|---------|-------------------|
    22вҶ’| **Server Unit-Test schreiben** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md), [mocking](docs/testing/mocking.md), [server-patterns](docs/testing/server-patterns.md) |
    23вҶ’| **Frontend-Komponenten-Test schreiben** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md), [frontend](docs/testing/frontend.md) |
    24вҶ’| **E2E-Test schreiben** | [e2e](docs/testing/e2e.md) |
    25вҶ’| **Code-Review durchfГјhren** | [review](docs/testing/review.md), [mocking](docs/testing/mocking.md) |
    26вҶ’| **Flaky Test debuggen** | [flaky](docs/testing/flaky.md) |
    27вҶ’| **Coverage verbessern** | [coverage](docs/testing/coverage.md) |
    28вҶ’| **Test-Kategorien wГӨhlen** | [categories](docs/testing/categories.md) |
    29вҶ’| **VerfГјgbare Fixtures finden** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md) |
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’---
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’## Kern-Prinzipien (immer gГјltig)
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’### Verhalten testen, nicht Implementierung
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’Tests prГјfen **was** eine Funktion tut, nicht **wie** sie es tut.
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’```typescript
    40вҶ’// RICHTIG: Verhalten testen
    41вҶ’test("generatePreview returns formatted markdown for selection", () => {
    42вҶ’  const selection = createSelection({ selectedText: "Hello **world**" })
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’  const result = generatePreview(selection)
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’  expect(result).toContain("Hello")
    47вҶ’  expect(result).toMatch(/world/)
    48вҶ’})
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’// FALSCH: Implementierung testen
    51вҶ’test("generatePreview calls internal parser", () => {
    52вҶ’  const spy = vi.spyOn(internals, "parseMarkdown")
    53вҶ’  generatePreview(createSelection())
    54вҶ’  expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalled() // Bricht bei Refactoring
    55вҶ’})
    56вҶ’```
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’### Arrange-Act-Assert (AAA)
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’Jeder Test folgt dem AAA-Pattern, visuell getrennt durch Leerzeilen:
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’```typescript
    63вҶ’test("createSelection merges overrides into defaults", () => {
    64вҶ’  // Arrange
    65вҶ’  const overrides = { blockIndex: 5, blockType: "heading" as const }
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’  // Act
    68вҶ’  const result = createSelection(overrides)
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’  // Assert
    71вҶ’  expect(result.blockIndex).toBe(5)
    72вҶ’  expect(result.blockType).toBe("heading")
    73вҶ’  expect(result.messageId).toBe("message-1") // Default beibehalten
    74вҶ’})
    75вҶ’```
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’### Given-When-Then (fГјr komplexe Szenarien)
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’```typescript
    80вҶ’test("adjustment session deduplicates when same importId+format exists", () => {
    81вҶ’  /**
    82вҶ’   * Given: Eine aktive Session fГјr importId "abc" mit Format "markdown"
    83вҶ’   * When: createOrReuse mit gleichen Parametern aufgerufen wird
    84вҶ’   * Then: Bestehende Session zurГјckgegeben, keine neue erstellt
    85вҶ’   */
    86вҶ’})
    87вҶ’```
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’### Tests als Dokumentation
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’Gute Testnamen lesen sich wie Spezifikationen:
    92вҶ’- `"generatePreview strips HTML tags from selection"`
    93вҶ’- `"adjustment assistant rejects empty draft messages"`
    94вҶ’- `"rule compiler maps heading selector to correct CSS"`
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’---
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’## Anti-Patterns (immer verboten)
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’| Anti-Pattern | Stattdessen |
   101вҶ’|--------------|-------------|
   102вҶ’| Implementierungsdetails testen | PrГјfe das Ergebnis, nicht den internen Call |
   103вҶ’| Tautologische Tests (`expect(x).toBeDefined()`) | PrГјfe spezifische Werte |
   104вҶ’| Overmocking (>3 Mocks pro Test) | Teste gegen echte Implementierung wo mГ¶glich |
   105вҶ’| Fragile Assertions (exakte Prompt-Strings) | PrГјfe nur Schema-KonformitГӨt |
   106вҶ’| Tests ohne Assertions | Jeder Test braucht mindestens eine verhaltensbasierte Assertion |
   107вҶ’| Copy-Paste statt Parametrisierung | `test.each` oder `describe.each` verwenden |
   108вҶ’| Feste Timeouts (`setTimeout`) fГјr Sync | `waitFor()` (RTL) oder `expect.poll()` (Playwright) |
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’---
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’## Namenskonventionen (Kurzreferenz)
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’| Element | Format | Beispiel |
   115вҶ’|---------|--------|----------|
   116вҶ’| Vitest-Testdatei | `<module>.test.ts` | `adjustment-preview.test.ts` |
   117вҶ’| Vitest-Komponententest | `<Component>.test.tsx` | `RulesList.test.tsx` |
   118вҶ’| Vitest-Test | `test("<verhalten>", ...)` | `test("rejects empty draft", ...)` |
   119вҶ’| Vitest-Gruppe | `describe("<Modul>", ...)` | `describe("AdjustmentPreview", ...)` |
   120вҶ’| E2E-Spec | `<feature>.spec.ts` | `import-flow.spec.ts` |
   121вҶ’| E2E-Page-Object | `<page>.page.ts` | `format-workspace.page.ts` |
   122вҶ’| E2E-Test | `test("<user-szenario>", ...)` | `test("user imports chat and sees workspace", ...)` |
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’---
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’## Detail-Module
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’| Modul | Pfad | Inhalt |
   129вҶ’|-------|------|--------|
   130вҶ’| **Fixtures** | [`docs/testing/fixtures.md`](docs/testing/fixtures.md) | Factory-Pattern, Test-Daten, bestehende Factories |
   131вҶ’| **Mocking** | [`docs/testing/mocking.md`](docs/testing/mocking.md) | Mock-Grenzen, `vi.fn()`, Fetch-Mocking |
   132вҶ’| **Server-Patterns** | [`docs/testing/server-patterns.md`](docs/testing/server-patterns.md) | Env-Snapshot, Fetch-Mock, Async-Testing |
   133вҶ’| **Frontend** | [`docs/testing/frontend.md`](docs/testing/frontend.md) | Vitest, React Testing Library, TanStack Query |
   134вҶ’| **E2E** | [`docs/testing/e2e.md`](docs/testing/e2e.md) | Playwright, Page Objects, Fixtures |
   135вҶ’| **Review** | [`docs/testing/review.md`](docs/testing/review.md) | 10-Punkte Review-Checkliste |
   136вҶ’| **Coverage** | [`docs/testing/coverage.md`](docs/testing/coverage.md) | Zielwerte, Stufenplan, Messung |
   137вҶ’| **Kategorien** | [`docs/testing/categories.md`](docs/testing/categories.md) | Test-Pyramide, Workspace-Filter, AusfГјhrungsbefehle |
   138вҶ’| **Flaky-Policy** | [`docs/testing/flaky.md`](docs/testing/flaky.md) | Definition, hГӨufige Ursachen, Beispiel-Fixes |
   139вҶ’

cd "/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter" && git add apps/web/src/lib/format-plugins.ts apps/web/src/lib/format-plugins.test.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(web): add FormatPlugin interface and client-side registry

Introduce a pluggable format system on the frontend that pairs
OutputFormatDescriptors with view components and optional content
transformers (prepareDownload, prepareCopy). Register all 4 built-in
formats (reader, markdown, handover, json) with ArtifactView as
placeholder ViewComponent вҖ” actual view wiring happens in Step 12.

Markdown plugin includes prepareDownload/prepareCopy via
applyMarkdownRules; reader defers complex deps to later integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

cd "/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter" && git add packages/shared/src/imports.ts apps/server/src/lib/import-store.ts apps/server/src/lib/import-store.test.ts apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/format-workspace.tsx && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(server): use ArtifactGeneratorRegistry in buildArtifacts

Replace hardcoded artifact generation in buildArtifacts() with the
pluggable ArtifactGeneratorRegistry. This enables dynamic format
registration instead of a fixed set of markdown/handover/json outputs.

- Migrate importArtifactsSchema from fixed z.object to z.record for
  dynamic keys
- Replace direct conversationToMarkdown/Handover imports with registry
- Simplify format-workspace artifact access (no more switch/cast needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

feat(web): add FormatPlugin interface and client-side registry

Introduce a pluggable format system on the frontend that pairs
OutputFormatDescriptors with view components and optional content
transformers (prepareDownload, prepareCopy). Register all 4 built-in
formats (reader, markdown, handover, json) with ArtifactView as
placeholder ViewComponent вҖ” actual view wiring happens in Step 12.

Markdown plugin includes prepareDownload/prepareCopy via
applyMarkdownRules; reader defers complex deps to later integration.

EOF
)" 2>&1

feat(server): use ArtifactGeneratorRegistry in buildArtifacts

Replace hardcoded artifact generation in buildArtifacts() with the
pluggable ArtifactGeneratorRegistry. This enables dynamic format
registration instead of a fixed set of markdown/handover/json outputs.

- Migrate importArtifactsSchema from fixed z.object to z.record for
  dynamic keys
- Replace direct conversationToMarkdown/Handover imports with registry
- Simplify format-workspace artifact access (no more switch/cast needed)
- Simplify router exportArtifact handler to use dynamic key access

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

commit 4e3aef295eddf8cbec934a8e135054a680a3780c
Author: Granular <166998957+brie1977@users.noreply.github.com>
Date:   Sun Mar 15 13:29:08 2026 +0100

    feat(server): use ArtifactGeneratorRegistry in buildArtifacts
    
    Replace hardcoded artifact generation in buildArtifacts() with the
    pluggable ArtifactGeneratorRegistry. This enables dynamic format
    registration instead of a fixed set of markdown/handover/json outputs.
    
    - Migrate importArtifactsSchema from fixed z.object to z.record for
      dynamic keys
    - Replace direct conversationToMarkdown/Handover imports with registry
    - Simplify format-workspace artifact access (no more switch/cast needed)
    - Simplify router exportArtifact handler to use dynamic key access
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
    Entire-Checkpoint: dac2ba508dd3

content.text:
All changes are committed. The untracked files are pre-existing and not related to this task.

Here is a summary of what was done:

**Commit:** `4e3aef2 feat(server): use ArtifactGeneratorRegistry in buildArtifacts`

**Changes made across 5 files:**

1. `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/packages/shared/src/imports.ts` -- Changed `importArtifactsSchema` from `z.object({ markdown, handover, json })` to `z.record(z.string(), z.string())`, making `ImportArtifacts` a dynamic `Record<string, string>`.

2. `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/server/src/lib/import-store.ts` -- Replaced hardcoded `buildArtifacts()` with registry-based generation. Imports `ArtifactGeneratorRegistry` and the three generators, iterates over registered generators to build artifacts dynamically. Removed unused `conversationToMarkdown`, `conversationToHandover`, and `listPersistedImports` imports.

3. `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/server/src/lib/import-store.test.ts` -- Added test "artifacts contain all registered generator formats" verifying that all three format keys (markdown, handover, json) are present and the JSON artifact contains valid conversation data.

4. `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/server/src/rpc/router.ts` -- Simplified `exportArtifact` handler from a switch statement to dynamic key access (`job?.artifacts?.[input.format]`), fixing the TypeScript error from the schema change.

5. `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/components/format-workspace/format-workspace.tsx` -- Removed the `renderArtifact` helper function and replaced it with simple `job.artifacts?.[view]` access, since `Record<string, string>` allows direct key lookup without type casting.

**Verification:** All shared tests (110), import-store tests (12), artifact-generators tests (11), and router tests (54) pass. Biome lint and TypeScript typecheck (server + shared) pass clean.

- `/Users/philippbriese/Documents/dev/chat exporter/apps/web/src/lib/format-plugins.test.ts` вҖ” 13 tests covering registry operations (register, get, getAll, duplicate prevention) and built-in plugin validation

**Key design decisions:**

**Verification:** 13/13 tests pass, Biome lint clean, TypeScript typecheck clean for `@chat-exporter/web`.

1вҶ’# Testing Best Practices вҖ” Chat Exporter
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Verbindliche Referenz fГјr alle Tests in diesem Projekt.
     4вҶ’> Dieses Dokument ist ein **Smart Index** вҖ” es enthГӨlt die Kern-Prinzipien inline und verweist auf Detail-Module in `docs/testing/`.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’## Tech-Stack
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’| Bereich | Tool | Version |
     9вҶ’|---------|------|---------|
    10вҶ’| Unit/Integration | **Vitest** | ^4.0 |
    11вҶ’| E2E | **Playwright** | ^1.58 |
    12вҶ’| Coverage | **@vitest/coverage-v8** | ^4.0 |
    13вҶ’| Monorepo | **Turborepo + pnpm** | вҖ” |
    14вҶ’| Linting | **Biome** | ^2.4 |
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’## Aufgabenbasiertes Routing
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’**Lies nur die Module, die fГјr deine aktuelle Aufgabe relevant sind:**
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’| Aufgabe | Lade diese Module |
    21вҶ’|---------|-------------------|
    22вҶ’| **Server Unit-Test schreiben** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md), [mocking](docs/testing/mocking.md), [server-patterns](docs/testing/server-patterns.md) |
    23вҶ’| **Frontend-Komponenten-Test schreiben** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md), [frontend](docs/testing/frontend.md) |
    24вҶ’| **E2E-Test schreiben** | [e2e](docs/testing/e2e.md) |
    25вҶ’| **Code-Review durchfГјhren** | [review](docs/testing/review.md), [mocking](docs/testing/mocking.md) |
    26вҶ’| **Flaky Test debuggen** | [flaky](docs/testing/flaky.md) |
    27вҶ’| **Coverage verbessern** | [coverage](docs/testing/coverage.md) |
    28вҶ’| **Test-Kategorien wГӨhlen** | [categories](docs/testing/categories.md) |
    29вҶ’| **VerfГјgbare Fixtures finden** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md) |
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’---
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’## Kern-Prinzipien (immer gГјltig)
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’### Verhalten testen, nicht Implementierung
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’Tests prГјfen **was** eine Funktion tut, nicht **wie** sie es tut.
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’```typescript
    40вҶ’// RICHTIG: Verhalten testen
    41вҶ’test("generatePreview returns formatted markdown for selection", () => {
    42вҶ’  const selection = createSelection({ selectedText: "Hello **world**" })
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’  const result = generatePreview(selection)
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’  expect(result).toContain("Hello")
    47вҶ’  expect(result).toMatch(/world/)
    48вҶ’})
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’// FALSCH: Implementierung testen
    51вҶ’test("generatePreview calls internal parser", () => {
    52вҶ’  const spy = vi.spyOn(internals, "parseMarkdown")
    53вҶ’  generatePreview(createSelection())
    54вҶ’  expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalled() // Bricht bei Refactoring
    55вҶ’})
    56вҶ’```
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’### Arrange-Act-Assert (AAA)
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’Jeder Test folgt dem AAA-Pattern, visuell getrennt durch Leerzeilen:
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’```typescript
    63вҶ’test("createSelection merges overrides into defaults", () => {
    64вҶ’  // Arrange
    65вҶ’  const overrides = { blockIndex: 5, blockType: "heading" as const }
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’  // Act
    68вҶ’  const result = createSelection(overrides)
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’  // Assert
    71вҶ’  expect(result.blockIndex).toBe(5)
    72вҶ’  expect(result.blockType).toBe("heading")
    73вҶ’  expect(result.messageId).toBe("message-1") // Default beibehalten
    74вҶ’})
    75вҶ’```
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’### Given-When-Then (fГјr komplexe Szenarien)
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’```typescript
    80вҶ’test("adjustment session deduplicates when same importId+format exists", () => {
    81вҶ’  /**
    82вҶ’   * Given: Eine aktive Session fГјr importId "abc" mit Format "markdown"
    83вҶ’   * When: createOrReuse mit gleichen Parametern aufgerufen wird
    84вҶ’   * Then: Bestehende Session zurГјckgegeben, keine neue erstellt
    85вҶ’   */
    86вҶ’})
    87вҶ’```
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’### Tests als Dokumentation
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’Gute Testnamen lesen sich wie Spezifikationen:
    92вҶ’- `"generatePreview strips HTML tags from selection"`
    93вҶ’- `"adjustment assistant rejects empty draft messages"`
    94вҶ’- `"rule compiler maps heading selector to correct CSS"`
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’---
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’## Anti-Patterns (immer verboten)
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’| Anti-Pattern | Stattdessen |
   101вҶ’|--------------|-------------|
   102вҶ’| Implementierungsdetails testen | PrГјfe das Ergebnis, nicht den internen Call |
   103вҶ’| Tautologische Tests (`expect(x).toBeDefined()`) | PrГјfe spezifische Werte |
   104вҶ’| Overmocking (>3 Mocks pro Test) | Teste gegen echte Implementierung wo mГ¶glich |
   105вҶ’| Fragile Assertions (exakte Prompt-Strings) | PrГјfe nur Schema-KonformitГӨt |
   106вҶ’| Tests ohne Assertions | Jeder Test braucht mindestens eine verhaltensbasierte Assertion |
   107вҶ’| Copy-Paste statt Parametrisierung | `test.each` oder `describe.each` verwenden |
   108вҶ’| Feste Timeouts (`setTimeout`) fГјr Sync | `waitFor()` (RTL) oder `expect.poll()` (Playwright) |
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’---
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’## Namenskonventionen (Kurzreferenz)
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’| Element | Format | Beispiel |
   115вҶ’|---------|--------|----------|
   116вҶ’| Vitest-Testdatei | `<module>.test.ts` | `adjustment-preview.test.ts` |
   117вҶ’| Vitest-Komponententest | `<Component>.test.tsx` | `RulesList.test.tsx` |
   118вҶ’| Vitest-Test | `test("<verhalten>", ...)` | `test("rejects empty draft", ...)` |
   119вҶ’| Vitest-Gruppe | `describe("<Modul>", ...)` | `describe("AdjustmentPreview", ...)` |
   120вҶ’| E2E-Spec | `<feature>.spec.ts` | `import-flow.spec.ts` |
   121вҶ’| E2E-Page-Object | `<page>.page.ts` | `format-workspace.page.ts` |
   122вҶ’| E2E-Test | `test("<user-szenario>", ...)` | `test("user imports chat and sees workspace", ...)` |
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’---
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’## Detail-Module
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’| Modul | Pfad | Inhalt |
   129вҶ’|-------|------|--------|
   130вҶ’| **Fixtures** | [`docs/testing/fixtures.md`](docs/testing/fixtures.md) | Factory-Pattern, Test-Daten, bestehende Factories |
   131вҶ’| **Mocking** | [`docs/testing/mocking.md`](docs/testing/mocking.md) | Mock-Grenzen, `vi.fn()`, Fetch-Mocking |
   132вҶ’| **Server-Patterns** | [`docs/testing/server-patterns.md`](docs/testing/server-patterns.md) | Env-Snapshot, Fetch-Mock, Async-Testing |
   133вҶ’| **Frontend** | [`docs/testing/frontend.md`](docs/testing/frontend.md) | Vitest, React Testing Library, TanStack Query |
   134вҶ’| **E2E** | [`docs/testing/e2e.md`](docs/testing/e2e.md) | Playwright, Page Objects, Fixtures |
   135вҶ’| **Review** | [`docs/testing/review.md`](docs/testing/review.md) | 10-Punkte Review-Checkliste |
   136вҶ’| **Coverage** | [`docs/testing/coverage.md`](docs/testing/coverage.md) | Zielwerte, Stufenplan, Messung |
   137вҶ’| **Kategorien** | [`docs/testing/categories.md`](docs/testing/categories.md) | Test-Pyramide, Workspace-Filter, AusfГјhrungsbefehle |
   138вҶ’| **Flaky-Policy** | [`docs/testing/flaky.md`](docs/testing/flaky.md) | Definition, hГӨufige Ursachen, Beispiel-Fixes |
   139вҶ’
   140вҶ’---
   141вҶ’
   142вҶ’> **Hinweis**: Dieses Dokument und seine Module sind lebende Dokumente. Bei Г„nderungen an Test-Praktiken mГјssen die betroffenen Module aktualisiert werden.
   143вҶ’

1вҶ’# Server-spezifische Test-Patterns
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Detail-Referenz вҖ” geladen aus `TESTING.md` Index.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Environment-Variable-Snapshot
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’Tests die `process.env` manipulieren, mГјssen den Originalzustand wiederherstellen:
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’```typescript
    10вҶ’test("uses custom API key from env", async () => {
    11вҶ’  const originalEnv = { ...process.env }
    12вҶ’  try {
    13вҶ’    process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY = "test-key-123"
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’    const result = await createClient()
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’    expect(result.apiKey).toBe("test-key-123")
    18вҶ’  } finally {
    19вҶ’    process.env = originalEnv
    20вҶ’  }
    21вҶ’}
    22вҶ’```
    23вҶ’
    24вҶ’### Alternativ mit `beforeEach`/`afterEach`
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’```typescript
    27вҶ’describe("API Client", () => {
    28вҶ’  const originalEnv = { ...process.env }
    29вҶ’
    30вҶ’  afterEach(() => {
    31вҶ’    process.env = { ...originalEnv }
    32вҶ’  })
    33вҶ’
    34вҶ’  test("falls back to default when key missing", async () => {
    35вҶ’    delete process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY
    36вҶ’    await expect(createClient()).rejects.toThrow(/API key/i)
    37вҶ’  })
    38вҶ’})
    39вҶ’```
    40вҶ’
    41вҶ’## Fetch-Mock mit Cleanup
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’```typescript
    44вҶ’describe("AdjustmentAssistant", () => {
    45вҶ’  const originalFetch = globalThis.fetch
    46вҶ’
    47вҶ’  afterEach(() => {
    48вҶ’    globalThis.fetch = originalFetch
    49вҶ’  })
    50вҶ’
    51вҶ’  test("sends structured request to provider", async () => {
    52вҶ’    globalThis.fetch = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
    53вҶ’      new Response(JSON.stringify({ choices: [{ message: { content: "result" } }] })),
    54вҶ’    )
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’    const result = await assistant.process("input")
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’    expect(result).toBe("result")
    59вҶ’  })
    60вҶ’})
    61вҶ’```
    62вҶ’
    63вҶ’## Async-Testing
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’Vitest unterstГјtzt async Tests nativ вҖ” kein spezielles Plugin nГ¶tig:
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’```typescript
    68вҶ’// Async-Ergebnis prГјfen
    69вҶ’test("compiles rules asynchronously", async () => {
    70вҶ’  const rules = await compileRules(draftRules)
    71вҶ’  expect(rules).toHaveLength(3)
    72вҶ’})
    73вҶ’
    74вҶ’// Async-Fehler prГјfen
    75вҶ’test("rejects invalid rule format", async () => {
    76вҶ’  await expect(compileRules(invalidInput)).rejects.toThrow(/invalid selector/i)
    77вҶ’})
    78вҶ’```
    79вҶ’
    80вҶ’## Zod-Schema-Validierung testen
    81вҶ’
    82вҶ’Teste Validierung mit echten Zod-Schemas, nicht Mocks:
    83вҶ’
    84вҶ’```typescript
    85вҶ’import { DraftRuleSchema } from "@chat-exporter/shared"
    86вҶ’
    87вҶ’test("rejects rule without selector", () => {
    88вҶ’  const result = DraftRuleSchema.safeParse({ effect: { type: "replace", value: "x" } })
    89вҶ’
    90вҶ’  expect(result.success).toBe(false)
    91вҶ’  expect(result.error?.issues[0].path).toContain("selector")
    92вҶ’})
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’test.each(["heading", "paragraph", "code-block"])("accepts valid selector type: %s", (type) => {
    95вҶ’  const result = DraftRuleSchema.safeParse({
    96вҶ’    selector: { type, value: "test" },
    97вҶ’    effect: { type: "replace", value: "changed" },
    98вҶ’  })
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’  expect(result.success).toBe(true)
   101вҶ’})
   102вҶ’```
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’## Test-Imports
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’Server-Tests importieren Vitest-Globals explizit:
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’```typescript
   109вҶ’import { describe, expect, test } from "vitest"
   110вҶ’import type { AdjustmentSelection } from "@chat-exporter/shared"
   111вҶ’```
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’## Testdatei-Platzierung
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’Tests liegen **neben dem Quellcode** (co-located):
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’```
   118вҶ’apps/server/src/lib/
   119вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ adjustment-preview.ts
   120вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ adjustment-preview.test.ts
   121вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җ adjustment-assistant.ts
   122вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җ adjustment-assistant.test.ts
   123вҶ’```
   124вҶ’

1вҶ’# Testing Best Practices вҖ” Chat Exporter
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Verbindliche Referenz fГјr alle Tests in diesem Projekt.
     4вҶ’> Dieses Dokument ist ein **Smart Index** вҖ” es enthГӨlt die Kern-Prinzipien inline und verweist auf Detail-Module in `docs/testing/`.
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’## Tech-Stack
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’| Bereich | Tool | Version |
     9вҶ’|---------|------|---------|
    10вҶ’| Unit/Integration | **Vitest** | ^4.0 |
    11вҶ’| E2E | **Playwright** | ^1.58 |
    12вҶ’| Coverage | **@vitest/coverage-v8** | ^4.0 |
    13вҶ’| Monorepo | **Turborepo + pnpm** | вҖ” |
    14вҶ’| Linting | **Biome** | ^2.4 |
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’## Aufgabenbasiertes Routing
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’**Lies nur die Module, die fГјr deine aktuelle Aufgabe relevant sind:**
    19вҶ’
    20вҶ’| Aufgabe | Lade diese Module |
    21вҶ’|---------|-------------------|
    22вҶ’| **Server Unit-Test schreiben** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md), [mocking](docs/testing/mocking.md), [server-patterns](docs/testing/server-patterns.md) |
    23вҶ’| **Frontend-Komponenten-Test schreiben** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md), [frontend](docs/testing/frontend.md) |
    24вҶ’| **E2E-Test schreiben** | [e2e](docs/testing/e2e.md) |
    25вҶ’| **Code-Review durchfГјhren** | [review](docs/testing/review.md), [mocking](docs/testing/mocking.md) |
    26вҶ’| **Flaky Test debuggen** | [flaky](docs/testing/flaky.md) |
    27вҶ’| **Coverage verbessern** | [coverage](docs/testing/coverage.md) |
    28вҶ’| **Test-Kategorien wГӨhlen** | [categories](docs/testing/categories.md) |
    29вҶ’| **VerfГјgbare Fixtures finden** | [fixtures](docs/testing/fixtures.md) |
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’---
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’## Kern-Prinzipien (immer gГјltig)
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’### Verhalten testen, nicht Implementierung
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’Tests prГјfen **was** eine Funktion tut, nicht **wie** sie es tut.
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’```typescript
    40вҶ’// RICHTIG: Verhalten testen
    41вҶ’test("generatePreview returns formatted markdown for selection", () => {
    42вҶ’  const selection = createSelection({ selectedText: "Hello **world**" })
    43вҶ’
    44вҶ’  const result = generatePreview(selection)
    45вҶ’
    46вҶ’  expect(result).toContain("Hello")
    47вҶ’  expect(result).toMatch(/world/)
    48вҶ’})
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’// FALSCH: Implementierung testen
    51вҶ’test("generatePreview calls internal parser", () => {
    52вҶ’  const spy = vi.spyOn(internals, "parseMarkdown")
    53вҶ’  generatePreview(createSelection())
    54вҶ’  expect(spy).toHaveBeenCalled() // Bricht bei Refactoring
    55вҶ’})
    56вҶ’```
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’### Arrange-Act-Assert (AAA)
    59вҶ’
    60вҶ’Jeder Test folgt dem AAA-Pattern, visuell getrennt durch Leerzeilen:
    61вҶ’
    62вҶ’```typescript
    63вҶ’test("createSelection merges overrides into defaults", () => {
    64вҶ’  // Arrange
    65вҶ’  const overrides = { blockIndex: 5, blockType: "heading" as const }
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’  // Act
    68вҶ’  const result = createSelection(overrides)
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’  // Assert
    71вҶ’  expect(result.blockIndex).toBe(5)
    72вҶ’  expect(result.blockType).toBe("heading")
    73вҶ’  expect(result.messageId).toBe("message-1") // Default beibehalten
    74вҶ’})
    75вҶ’```
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’### Given-When-Then (fГјr komplexe Szenarien)
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’```typescript
    80вҶ’test("adjustment session deduplicates when same importId+format exists", () => {
    81вҶ’  /**
    82вҶ’   * Given: Eine aktive Session fГјr importId "abc" mit Format "markdown"
    83вҶ’   * When: createOrReuse mit gleichen Parametern aufgerufen wird
    84вҶ’   * Then: Bestehende Session zurГјckgegeben, keine neue erstellt
    85вҶ’   */
    86вҶ’})
    87вҶ’```
    88вҶ’
    89вҶ’### Tests als Dokumentation
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’Gute Testnamen lesen sich wie Spezifikationen:
    92вҶ’- `"generatePreview strips HTML tags from selection"`
    93вҶ’- `"adjustment assistant rejects empty draft messages"`
    94вҶ’- `"rule compiler maps heading selector to correct CSS"`
    95вҶ’
    96вҶ’---
    97вҶ’
    98вҶ’## Anti-Patterns (immer verboten)
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’| Anti-Pattern | Stattdessen |
   101вҶ’|--------------|-------------|
   102вҶ’| Implementierungsdetails testen | PrГјfe das Ergebnis, nicht den internen Call |
   103вҶ’| Tautologische Tests (`expect(x).toBeDefined()`) | PrГјfe spezifische Werte |
   104вҶ’| Overmocking (>3 Mocks pro Test) | Teste gegen echte Implementierung wo mГ¶glich |
   105вҶ’| Fragile Assertions (exakte Prompt-Strings) | PrГјfe nur Schema-KonformitГӨt |
   106вҶ’| Tests ohne Assertions | Jeder Test braucht mindestens eine verhaltensbasierte Assertion |
   107вҶ’| Copy-Paste statt Parametrisierung | `test.each` oder `describe.each` verwenden |
   108вҶ’| Feste Timeouts (`setTimeout`) fГјr Sync | `waitFor()` (RTL) oder `expect.poll()` (Playwright) |
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’---
   111вҶ’
   112вҶ’## Namenskonventionen (Kurzreferenz)
   113вҶ’
   114вҶ’| Element | Format | Beispiel |
   115вҶ’|---------|--------|----------|
   116вҶ’| Vitest-Testdatei | `<module>.test.ts` | `adjustment-preview.test.ts` |
   117вҶ’| Vitest-Komponententest | `<Component>.test.tsx` | `RulesList.test.tsx` |
   118вҶ’| Vitest-Test | `test("<verhalten>", ...)` | `test("rejects empty draft", ...)` |
   119вҶ’| Vitest-Gruppe | `describe("<Modul>", ...)` | `describe("AdjustmentPreview", ...)` |
   120вҶ’| E2E-Spec | `<feature>.spec.ts` | `import-flow.spec.ts` |
   121вҶ’| E2E-Page-Object | `<page>.page.ts` | `format-workspace.page.ts` |
   122вҶ’| E2E-Test | `test("<user-szenario>", ...)` | `test("user imports chat and sees workspace", ...)` |
   123вҶ’
   124вҶ’---
   125вҶ’
   126вҶ’## Detail-Module
   127вҶ’
   128вҶ’| Modul | Pfad | Inhalt |
   129вҶ’|-------|------|--------|
   130вҶ’| **Fixtures** | [`docs/testing/fixtures.md`](docs/testing/fixtures.md) | Factory-Pattern, Test-Daten, bestehende Factories |
   131вҶ’| **Mocking** | [`docs/testing/mocking.md`](docs/testing/mocking.md) | Mock-Grenzen, `vi.fn()`, Fetch-Mocking |
   132вҶ’| **Server-Patterns** | [`docs/testing/server-patterns.md`](docs/testing/server-patterns.md) | Env-Snapshot, Fetch-Mock, Async-Testing |
   133вҶ’| **Frontend** | [`docs/testing/frontend.md`](docs/testing/frontend.md) | Vitest, React Testing Library, TanStack Query |
   134вҶ’| **E2E** | [`docs/testing/e2e.md`](docs/testing/e2e.md) | Playwright, Page Objects, Fixtures |
   135вҶ’| **Review** | [`docs/testing/review.md`](docs/testing/review.md) | 10-Punkte Review-Checkliste |
   136вҶ’| **Coverage** | [`docs/testing/coverage.md`](docs/testing/coverage.md) | Zielwerte, Stufenplan, Messung |
   137вҶ’| **Kategorien** | [`docs/testing/categories.md`](docs/testing/categories.md) | Test-Pyramide, Workspace-Filter, AusfГјhrungsbefehle |
   138вҶ’| **Flaky-Policy** | [`docs/testing/flaky.md`](docs/testing/flaky.md) | Definition, hГӨufige Ursachen, Beispiel-Fixes |
   139вҶ’

1вҶ’# Frontend-Testing-Standards
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’> Detail-Referenz вҖ” geladen aus `TESTING.md` Index.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’## Stack
     6вҶ’
     7вҶ’| Komponente | Tool |
     8вҶ’|------------|------|
     9вҶ’| Test-Runner | **Vitest** |
    10вҶ’| Umgebung | **jsdom** |
    11вҶ’| Rendering | **React Testing Library** (`@testing-library/react`) |
    12вҶ’| User-Events | **userEvent** (`@testing-library/user-event`) |
    13вҶ’| State-Management | **TanStack Query** (via `createTestQueryClient()`) |
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’> **Status**: Web-App hat noch keine Unit-Tests. Dieses Modul definiert die Standards fГјr zukГјnftige Tests.
    16вҶ’
    17вҶ’## Rendering-Pattern
    18вҶ’
    19вҶ’Alle Komponenten-Tests mГјssen einen QueryClient-Wrapper verwenden:
    20вҶ’
    21вҶ’```typescript
    22вҶ’import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query"
    23вҶ’import { render } from "@testing-library/react"
    24вҶ’import type { ReactNode } from "react"
    25вҶ’
    26вҶ’function createTestQueryClient() {
    27вҶ’  return new QueryClient({
    28вҶ’    defaultOptions: {
    29вҶ’      queries: { retry: false },
    30вҶ’      mutations: { retry: false },
    31вҶ’    },
    32вҶ’  })
    33вҶ’}
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’function renderWithProviders(ui: ReactNode) {
    36вҶ’  const queryClient = createTestQueryClient()
    37вҶ’  return render(
    38вҶ’    <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>{ui}</QueryClientProvider>,
    39вҶ’  )
    40вҶ’}
    41вҶ’```
    42вҶ’
    43вҶ’```typescript
    44вҶ’// FALSCH: Ohne Provider вҖ” schlГӨgt fehl bei Komponenten mit Queries/Mutations
    45вҶ’render(<FormatWorkspace />)
    46вҶ’```
    47вҶ’
    48вҶ’## User-Interaktionen
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’Immer `userEvent` statt `fireEvent` verwenden вҖ” nГӨher am realen Nutzerverhalten:
    51вҶ’
    52вҶ’```typescript
    53вҶ’import userEvent from "@testing-library/user-event"
    54вҶ’
    55вҶ’test("toggle switches adjustment mode", async () => {
    56вҶ’  const user = userEvent.setup()
    57вҶ’  renderWithProviders(<AdjustmentToggle />)
    58вҶ’
    59вҶ’  await user.click(screen.getByRole("switch"))
    60вҶ’
    61вҶ’  expect(screen.getByRole("switch")).toBeChecked()
    62вҶ’})
    63вҶ’```
    64вҶ’
    65вҶ’## Async-Rendering abwarten
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’```typescript
    68вҶ’import { screen, waitFor } from "@testing-library/react"
    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’test("loads and displays rules", async () => {
    71вҶ’  renderWithProviders(<RulesList />)
    72вҶ’
    73вҶ’  await waitFor(() =>
    74вҶ’    expect(screen.getByText("Heading Rule")).toBeInTheDocument(),
    75вҶ’  )
    76вҶ’})
    77вҶ’```
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’## Hook-Testing
    80вҶ’
    81вҶ’TanStack Query Hooks mit `renderHook` testen:
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’```typescript
    84вҶ’import { renderHook, waitFor } from "@testing-library/react"
    85вҶ’
    86вҶ’test("fetches adjustment session", async () => {
    87вҶ’  const wrapper = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => (
    88вҶ’    <QueryClientProvider client={createTestQueryClient()}>
    89вҶ’      {children}
    90вҶ’    </QueryClientProvider>
    91вҶ’  )
    92вҶ’
    93вҶ’  const { result } = renderHook(() => useAdjustmentSession("abc"), { wrapper })
    94вҶ’
    95вҶ’  await waitFor(() => expect(result.current.isSuccess).toBe(true))
    96вҶ’  expect(result.current.data?.rules).toHaveLength(2)
    97вҶ’})
    98вҶ’```
    99вҶ’
   100вҶ’## Radix UI Polyfills
   101вҶ’
   102вҶ’Komponenten die Radix UI nutzen (shadcn/ui), brauchen Browser-API-Polyfills:
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’```typescript
   105вҶ’beforeAll(() => {
   106вҶ’  Element.prototype.hasPointerCapture ??= vi.fn().mockReturnValue(false)
   107вҶ’  Element.prototype.setPointerCapture ??= vi.fn()
   108вҶ’  Element.prototype.releasePointerCapture ??= vi.fn()
   109вҶ’  Element.prototype.scrollIntoView ??= vi.fn()
   110вҶ’})
   111вҶ’```
   112вҶ’
   113вҶ’## Namenskonventionen
   114вҶ’
   115вҶ’| Element | Format | Beispiel |
   116вҶ’|---------|--------|----------|
   117вҶ’| Testdatei | `<Component>.test.tsx` | `RulesList.test.tsx` |
   118вҶ’| Testdatei (non-React) | `<module>.test.ts` | `format-utils.test.ts` |
   119вҶ’| Test-Suite | `describe("<Component>", ...)` | `describe("RulesList", ...)` |
   120вҶ’| Einzeltest | `test("<verhalten>", ...)` | `test("renders connected badge when active", ...)` |
   121вҶ’

All 56 router tests pass. Typecheck passes across all three packages (shared, server, web). The `router.ts` handler already used dynamic key access (`job?.artifacts?.[input.format]`) so no changes were needed there.
